title: koeleria trivialis
intro: Koeleria trivialis, also known as June grass or small June grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa, and is widely distributed across temperate regions. Koeleria trivialis has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been used to prepare various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation.
